  • Open

    Review: Wendy's Chicken Tenders
    Wendy's Chicken Tenders feature chicken breast tenders with a seasoned, crispy-fried breading. Three tenders cost me $5.49. Interestingly, three McDonald's McCrispy Strips cost $6.39 in my area, but four McCrispy Strips are $7.39, while four Wendy's Tenders are $7.49. It'll be interesting to see if Wendy's raises the price on three Tenders after the initial launch period. I don't know if this is standard practice for the new Tenders or if it's just something my local Wendy's does, but I was told when ordering that it would take six minutes as the Tenders are cooked to order. I did go late at night, though. As a result, my Chicken Tenders were piping hot. They were satisfyingly crispy on the surface with a moderate amount of blooming-type batter. Inside, they were juicy and tender with a m…  ( 15 min )
    Arby's Serves Up New Steak Nuggets
    Embracing its "we have the meats" slogan, Arby's launches new Steak Nuggets, which are seasoned bite-sized pieces of steak in a similar vein as Chick-fil-A's Grilled Nuggets. Specifically, Arby's Steak Nuggets are hand-cut, seasoned with garlic and pepper, and then seared and smoked. They're meant to be convenient to eat on the go with your hands or a fork. Steak Nuggets are available on their own, in a sandwich, or in a bowl. You can get five or nine Steak Nuggets a la carte with a side of Hickory BBQ Sauce. The Steak Nugget Sandwich features Steak Nuggets with Havarti cheese, crispy-fried onions, pickles, and mayo on a toasted bun. The Steak Nugget Bowl features Steak Nuggets and crispy-fried onions on white cheddar Mac ‘n Cheese. Steak Nuggets are available now for a limited time at Arby’s restaurants nationwide. Photo via Arby's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Capriotti's Introduces New Chicken Bacon Ranch Sandwich
    Capriotti's launches the new Chicken Bacon Ranch sandwich as a response to customer demand for "bold flavors and heartier portions." The new sandwich features 25% more thinly sliced grilled chicken, hickory-smoked bacon, melted white American cheese, lettuce, tomato, and ranch on a soft roll. Prices vary, but here in the Los Angeles area, the Chicken Bacon Ranch costs $8.49 for a mini-sized sandwich, $12.99 for a small, $14.99 for a medium, and $24.99 for a large. Additionally, Capriotti's is running a promotion this month where its rewards members can get $5 off an order of $30 or more using the code "CBR25" when ordering online. Photo via Capriotti's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Taco John's Welcomes New Spicy Beef & Jalapeno Burrito and Crispy Chicken Bacon Ranch Burrito
    Taco John's introduces two new burritos to the menu: the Spicy Beef & Jalapeno Burrito and the Crispy Chicken Bacon Ranch Burrito. The Spicy Beef & Jalapeno Burrito features seasoned ground beef, Potato Oles, nacho cheese, lettuce, tomato, sour cream, pickled jalapenos, and Super Hot Sauce, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. Taco John's Crispy Chicken Bacon Ranch Burrito features Crispy Chicken Tenders, Potato Oles, nacho cheese, lettuce, tomato, bacon, and new Marzetti Ranch, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. Both burritos are available a la carte or in a combo with Potato Oles and a fountain drink. Also, starting October 21, 2025, Taco John's will be bringing back its Apple Grande. The dessert is a crispy cinnamon-sugar tortilla topped with warm apple filling, cinnamon candy spice, and Cheddar cheese topping. Photo via Taco John's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Applebee's Debuts New Grilled Cheese Cheeseburger and Pickle Fries
    Applebee's launches the new Grilled Cheese Cheeseburger and Crispy Pickle Fries this fall. Joining the new dishes are this year's round of Halloween-themed Spooky Sips. The new Grilled Cheese Cheeseburger arrives as a new entree option for the casual dining chain's 2 for $25 deal. It features a grilled beef patty, four slices of American cheese, and a sweet and savory jam, served on toasted potato bread with tomato basil soup on the side for dipping. Applebee's 2 for $25 deal is a long-running deal that lets you choose two entrees from a limited selection and one appetizer or two side salads for $25 at participating locations. It is available for dine-in, takeout, or delivery. New Crispy Pickle Fries join the available options for Applebee's Ultimate Trio sampler. The new side features crispy-fried pickle fries tossed in Tajin chile-lime seasoning, served with Mexi-ranch sauce for dipping. The Ultimate Trio was launched earlier this year, ahead of the football season, and is a build-your-own sampler special. You choose three appetizers and three dipping sauces for $14.99 at participating locations. As with the 2 for $25 deal, it's available for dine-in, takeout, and delivery. Applebee's limited-time Spooky Sips cocktails for the 2025 Halloween season introduce new $2 Vibe Drops that add an additional layer of flavor and a color-changing effect. This year's lineup includes: - New Tipsy Zombie - A mix of Bacardi Superior Rum, passion fruit, pineapple, cherry, and lime, topped with a gummi brain. You can add the $2 Melon Liqueur Vibe Drop to change it from blue to green. - New Dracula's Juice - Bacardi Superior Rum and Patrón Silver Tequila, shaken with strawberry and premium lemon sour. You can add the $2 Blue Curaçao Vibe Drop to change it from red to purple. Photo via Applebee's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Panda Express Launches New Crispy Sesame Shrimp & Beef
    Panda Express serves up new Crispy Sesame Shrimp & Beef as its latest seasonal entree starting October 8, 2025. The new offering features tempura-battered shrimp, crispy-fried beef strips, green beans, and red bell peppers wok-tossed with a "savory, subtly spicy umami sauce." The shrimp is the same as from Panda Express' Honey Walnut Shrimp, while the beef comes from the chain's Beijing Beef. According to Panda Express, Crispy Sesame Shrimp & Beef is "inspired by the classic Sichuan dish, Mouthwatering Chicken," which is poached chicken served cold with a chili oil sauce. Also on October 8, Panda Express will be introducing its Wok Wednesdays promotion (as a play on Taco Tuesdays). Each Wednesday, the promotion offers a game that can be played through the Panda Express mobile app to unlock "reward offers" for use on the same day. Photo via Panda Express. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

    New Limited-Edition Eggo Stranger Things Strawberry Waffles Arrive
    Eggo partners with Netflix's Stranger Things TV series to release new Eggo Stranger Things Strawberry Waffles, which are the brand's "first-ever strawberry red waffle with colors from natural sources." The color of the waffles mirrors the color of the rifts from the series, and waffles are also a favorite of the character Eleven from the show. The limited-time flavor arrives in time for Stranger Things' fifth and final season, which kicks off on November 26, 2025. You can find 10-count boxes of Eggo Stranger Things Strawberry Waffles for a suggested price of $3.59 at select stores starting this month. Stranger Things Homestyle Waffles featuring a themed box also arrive in stores nationwide this month. Eggo also makes regular Strawberry Waffles, but they're not red in color. Photo via Eggo. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    2025 National Taco Day Deals and Specials
    Tuesday, October 7, 2025, is National Taco Day. Here are some deals and specials to celebrate: - Del Taco - From October 7 through October 9, 2025, rewards members can get a free The Del Taco with a purchase of $10 or more. - El Pollo Loco - Through October 7, 2025, rewards members can get three chicken tacos for $5. You can choose from Chicken Taco al Carbon, Shredded Chicken Crunchy Taco, and Chicken Avocado Tacos. - Jack in the Box - On October 7, rewards members can get two free tacos with a $1 minimum order.  - Laredo Taco Company - On October 7, 2025, the 7-Eleven taco shop is offering BOGO Lunch Tacos and 2 for $5 El Gran Tocino Breakfast Tacos. - Moe's Southwest Grill - On October 7, Moe's is offering $2 tacos at participating locations. - Taco Bell - The chain is putting out various drops throughout October 7, 2025, in its mobile app for its rewards members starting at 9AM PT. Here's what the schedule looks like: 9AM - 500 rewards members can win a National Taco Day T-shirt. 11AM - The first 25,000 rewards members get a $1 Cantina Chicken Soft Taco. 1PM - The first 25,000 rewards members get a $1 Cantina Chicken Soft Taco. 3PM - The first 25,000 rewards members get a $1 Cantina Chicken Soft Taco. 5PM - The first 25,000 rewards members get a $1 Cantina Chicken Soft Taco. 7PM - 100 rewards members can win a year of Taco Tuesdays (i.e., they get a $160 Taco Bell gift card). There's also a "$5 off a Taco Party Pack" offer for October 7, 2025. - Taco John's - On October 7, 2025, rewards members who check in at Taco John's get a free crispy beef taco on their next visit. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    KFC Brings Back Honey BBQ Sauce
    KFC has brought back its Original Honey BBQ sauce and is making it available, for the first time, as a sauce option on its fried chicken, chicken sandwich, and chicken tenders, in addition to its wings. KFC's Original Honey BBQ was first introduced in the late 1990s as a sweet and smoky flavor for its wings. It was discontinued in the early 2000s. The sauce is now back at participating locations nationwide, while supplies last. On the money-saving side of things, KFC continues to offer its $3.99 Chicken Sandwich deal. The sandwich features an Extra Crispy chicken breast filet, pickles, and mayo or spicy sauce, on a toasted brioche bun. Additionally, the fast-food chain teases a schedule of rewards member-exclusive deals for the 13 days leading up to Halloween this year. The upcoming deals revealed include: a free Classic Chicken Sandwich with a $10 purchase, 50% off 12 pieces of chicken, and 50 Nuggets for $20. Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Crumbl Bakes New Biscoff Pie and More Through October 11, 2025
    Crumbl introduces its new Biscoff Pie as part of this week's limited-time menu available from October 6 through October 11, 2025. Here's the lineup you can expect to find at Crumbl bakeries nationwide this week: - New Biscoff Pie - A Biscoff–infused cream cheese pie filling on a crunchy Biscoff crust, topped with a smooth Biscoff cookie butter spread, whipped cream, and a Biscoff cookie. - Benson Boone's Moonbeam Ice Cream Cookie - A celebrity-themed product making a return, it features a chilled chocolate cookie packed with cookies & cream pieces, topped with moonbeam ice cream-inspired lemon, berry, and marshmallow toppings, a sweet white drizzle, and a sprinkle of cookies & cream. - Blue Monster Cookie featuring Chips Ahoy! - A chilled cookie made with brown sugar, semi-sweet chocolate chips, and Chips Ahoy! cookie pieces, topped with creamy blue vanilla frosting and a mini Chips Ahoy! cookie. - Brookie Cookie - A warm cookie that's a semi-sweet chocolate chip cookie on one half and a chocolate cookie on the other half. - Raspberry Butter Cake Cookie - A warm butter cake cookie infused with raspberry, topped with a buttery glaze, raspberry topping, and white buttercream. - Churro Cookie - A warm cinnamon cookie topped with cinnamon buttercream and a sprinkle of cinnamon sugar. - Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips. - Secret Menu - Crumbl continues to offer a "secret menu" cake or cookie that is determined by each location each week. You can find what's available near you by checking the Crumbl website or mobile app. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Wienerschnitzel Corn Dogs Now Available in Frozen Foods Aisle of Select Stores
    Wienerschnitzel partners with the Golden West Food Group to bring its Corn Dogs to the frozen food aisle at over 500 grocery stores in California and Nevada starting this month. Wienerschnitzel's grocery store Corn Dogs are available in two varieties: Original and Chili Cheese Flavored (a retail exclusive). Grocery store chains carrying the corn dogs include Save Mart, FoodMaxx, Lucky, Albertsons, and Vons. They come in a 37.38-oz box containing 14 corn dogs. The Golden West Food Group produces retail food products for several brands, including Guy Fieri's Flavortown, TGI Fridays, Tillamook, and Snake River Farms. Photo via Wienerschnitzel. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

    Pizza Hut Serves Up New Matcha Cheese Stuffed Crust Pizza in Brunei
    Pizza Hut is wrapping up a short two-week run of its new Matcha Cheese Stuffed Crust Pizza in Brunei. Available through October 8, 2025, the pizza features plenty of matcha (powdered, shade-grown green tea): there's matcha mixed into the cheese that's stuffed into the crust, dusted on top of the crust, and drizzled in a sweet sauce over the pizza (it sounds like it would taste very grassy). The pizza is otherwise topped simply with mozzarella with no sauce under it. The size of the Matcha Cheese Stuffed Crust Pizza ranges from a 5.5-inch personal pizza to an 11.5-inch large (which would be a half-inch smaller than a medium here in the US). Photo via Pizza Hut Brunei. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Burger King Introduces New Monster Menu for Halloween
    Burger King celebrates the 2025 Halloween season with the launch of the new Monster Menu, which gives a Halloween twist to some of the chain's classic menu items. Here's what you'll find on Burger King's Monster Menu: - Jack-O-Lantern Whopper - A flame-grilled beef patty, American cheese, bacon, tomatoes, lettuce, onions, pickles, ketchup, and mayo, on a Jack O' Lantern orange bun with black sesame seeds. - Vampire Nuggets - Crispy chicken nuggets shaped like vampire fangs and bats served in a carton sporting a coffin design. You can get them as part of a King Jr. Meal or a la carte.   - Mummy Mozzarella Fries - Mozzarella sticks "wrapped" in golden breading and then fried (i.e. regular mozzarella sticks). They are served in a limited-edition mummy-themed box with a side of marinara dipping sauce. - Franken-Candy Sundae - Vanilla soft serve topped with a "franken-mix" of Oreo cookie crumbles, purple franken-candy syrup, and purple and green popping candy. The Monster Menu is available now at participating locations nationwide. The menu is joined this Halloween by collectible Scooby-Doo kids' meal toys, Halloween-themed paper crowns, and limited-edition Monster Menu-inspired Halloween buckets. The toys and crowns are available now, while the buckets arrive starting October 13, 2025, at participating restaurants, while supplies last. Photo via Burger King. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Culver's Brings Back Pumpkin Shake and Concrete Mixer
    It's once again pumpkin season at Culver's with the return of the Pumpkin Spice Shake and Salted Caramel Pumpkin Concrete Mixer. The Pumpkin Spice Shake features pureed pumpkin and pumpkin pie spices blended with milk and vanilla frozen custard, and dusted with cinnamon. Prices vary, but a location in Milwaukee, WI, sells a small for 4.29, a medium for $5.49, and a large for $6.39. The Salted Caramel Pumpkin Concrete Mixer features vanilla frozen custard mixed with pureed pumpkin, pumpkin pie spices, and salted caramel. The same location charges $4.49 for a mini, $4.79 for a small, $5.69 for a medium, and $7.89 for a large. Both seasonal desserts are available now for a limited time. Photo via Culver's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Bojangles Welcomes New Salted Caramel Apple Crisp
    Bojangles adds the new Salted Caramel Apple Crisp to the menu as the chain's latest seasonal cobbler. Bojangles' Salted Caramel Apple Crisp is available now through the end of the year at participating locations. It features a warm apple topping, cinnamon streusel, and salted caramel served over a scratch-made buttermilk biscuit (i.e., it's apple crisp on a biscuit). The price of the fall treat varies, but a location in Smyrna, GA sells them for $1.99 each.  Previous seasonal cobbler flavors have included Peach, Strawberry, and Bo-Berry. Photo via Bojangles. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Wingstop Releases New Haunted Habanero Flavor for Halloween 2025
    Wingstop adds a new flavor for the 2025 Halloween season: Haunted Habanero. The new flavor is described by the chain in the following fashion: "Scary good. Wicked hot. This flavor haunts your taste buds with a slow-building burn that lingers long after the first bite." It rates a five out of five on Wingstop's heat scale. Available for a limited time now, Haunted Habanero can be ordered on any of Wingstop's wings, boneless wings, chicken sandwiches, and tenders. Photo via Wingstop. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Del Taco Debuts New Del Dorado Chicken Menu
    Del Taco debuts its new Del Dorado Chicken Menu. Available now for a limited time, the menu features a combination of the chain's grilled, marinated chicken with new Salsa Roja and returning spicy Jack cheese. The new Salsa Roja features a roasted tomatillo base with chipotle adobo, jalapeno peppers, chili peppers, and garlic powder. Items on the new Del Dorado Chicken Menu include: - New Del Dorado Chicken Epic Burrito - Grilled marinated chicken, Salsa Roja, slow-cooked beans, shredded spicy Jack cheese, diced onions, shredded cabbage, diced tomato, and sour cream, wrapped in a warm, oversized flour tortilla. - New Del Dorado Chicken Grilled Burrito (pictured)- Grilled marinated chicken, Salsa Roja, shredded spicy Jack cheese, cilantro lime rice, shredded cabbage, pico de gallo, and sou…  ( 15 min )
    Baskin-Robbins Launches New Galactic Brownie Ice Cream
    Baskin-Robbins launches new Galactic Brownie ice cream as a limited-time flavor with a cosmic theme. It's joined by the new Galactic Brownie Polar Pizza. The new ice cream is the Flavor of the Month for October and features brownie batter ice cream swirled with gooey chocolate icing, chewy brownie pieces, and rainbow chips. You can get it by the scoop in a cup or cone or in any number of treats offered by the ice cream parlor chain, including in a milkshake or ice cream cake. The Galactic Brownie Polar Pizza is positioned as a sweet, shareable dessert for Halloween, one of the busiest nights for pizza delivery. It features a double fudge brownie crust topped with Galactic Brownie ice cream, M&M's Milk Chocolate Candies, a drizzle of fudge, and Halloween-themed sprinkles. Galactic or cosmic brownies are a popular dessert to make at home with an appearance reminiscent of a sky full of stars. In stores, you'll most likely have come across them either as Little Debbie Cosmic Brownies and/or Pure Protein Galactic Brownie bars. Baskin-Robbins also has two deals for its rewards members this month: Throughout October, Baskin-Robbins Rewards members can get 20% off any Polar Pizza. On October 31, 2025, you can get 31% off all scoops of ice cream. Photo via Baskin-Robbins. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Re-Review: Taco Bell - Chili Cheese Burrito (2025)
    Taco Bell's Chili Cheese Burrito features chili and shredded cheese wrapped up in a warm flour tortilla. It cost me $2.99 for one. I last had one of these over 10 years ago (i.e., the pre-quarter days), so I thought it'd be fun to see if anything has changed from what I remember. When I previously reviewed the Chili Cheese Burrito, it was very liquid with a high potential of causing a mess. Fortunately, the years have been kind (or I was just lucky), and this particular Chili Cheese Burrito was less watery and didn't threaten to spill out with every bite I took. Texture-wise, the chili is similar to Taco Bell's seasoned ground beef, only with more liquid. The cheese was thoroughly melted, and the flour tortilla was soft but sturdy. As far as how it tastes, it's a pretty standard beef chili. It's enjoyable but not particularly outstanding. There's a tomato base with typical chili spices (garlic, onion, chili powder, etc.). There's just a bare hint of heat to it. It's joined by a bit of generic creaminess from the very mild cheese. If you want a handheld chili, it's not a bad way to go and is certainly meatier than your typical Taco Bell fare. It's one of the rare Taco Bell savory menu items that doesn't taste like anything else on the menu. For the purposes of the review, I got it without any customizations, but I'd recommend adding onions (free at my local Taco Bell, but some locations charge for them) and getting it grilled for extra flavor and texture. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Chili Cheese Burrito Calories - 380 Fat - 17g (Saturated Fat - 9g) Sodium - 970mg Carbs - 41g (Sugar - 2g) Protein - 15g Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Aldi Finds for October 2025
    Discount grocery store chain Aldi has released its schedule of limited-time Aldi Finds for October 2025. This month sees Aldi getting into the Halloween spirit with items like Mama Cozzi's Halloween Pumpkin Shaped Pizza and Southern Grove Halloween Trail Mix. At the end of the month, we see stuffing appearing as Thanksgiving approaches. Here's what this month's Aldi Finds calendar looks like: Available now: Reggano Pastas Halloween Pasta - $2.29 Emporium Selection Halloween Cheese Assortment - $4.49 Mama Cozzi's Halloween Pumpkin Shaped (pictured) or Ghost Shaped Pizza - $4.99 Mama Cozzi's Pizza Snacks - $4.99 Fusia Asian Inspirations Chicken or Pork Wonton Soup - $2.99 Whole & Simple Chicken Enchilada Burritos - $7.49 Specially Selected Sticky Toffee Pudding or Apple Cider Mini Cakes -…  ( 15 min )
    Culver's Introduces New Roasted Garlic & Bacon Pub Burger
    In addition to the previously announced return of the CurderBurger, Culver's introduces the new Roasted Garlic & Bacon Pub Burger. Available for a limited time through November 30, 2025, the latest pub burger from Culver's features one, two, or three beef patties, Wisconsin cheddar cheese, thick-cut bacon, garlic mayo, lettuce, tomato, and pickles, on a lightly buttered and toasted garlic herb pretzel bun. Prices vary, but at a location in Milwaukee, WI, the  Roasted Garlic & Bacon Pub Burger starts at $7.89 for a single (up to $12.98 for a triple). Getting it with a combo meal (with fries and a drink) costs $4.20 more. Photo via Culver's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Shake Shack Offers BOGO SmokeShack Through October 11, 2025
    Shake Shack is offering a Halloween special where you can buy a SmokeShack burger and get a second one for free through October 11, 2025. The chain plans to reveal BOGO deals on two other sandwiches: one on October 12, 2025, and one on October 22, 2025. The Halloween BOGO deal is only available when ordering at an in-restaurant kiosk, through the Shake Shack website, and through the Shake Shack mobile app using the promo code "SPOOKY" at checkout (you have to have two SmokeShacks in your cart for the code to apply). Orders made through the Shake Shack website and mobile app can be for pickup or delivery. There's a limit of one free burger per order. The SmokeShack features a quarter-pound Angus beef patty, American cheese, applewood-smoked bacon, chopped cherry peppers, and ShackSauce on a toasted potato bun. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Boo Batter is Back at Cold Stone Creamery for Halloween 2025
    Boo Batter Ice Cream makes its annual return to Cold Stone Creamery locations nationwide for the 2025 Halloween season. The seasonal, pitch-black cake batter ice cream is featured in the following treats: - Treat or Treat Creation - Boo Batter Ice Cream folded with Kit Kat, Halloween Oreo Cookies, and M&M's. - Witches' Boo Shake - A seasonal shake made with Boo Batter Ice Cream and Halloween Oreo Cookies, crowned with whipped topping and "spooky" (orange pumpkins, black bats, and white ghosts) sprinkles. - Boo Batter Ice Cream Taco (pictured) - Boo Batter Ice Cream wrapped in an orange waffle taco, coated with chocolate and spooky sprinkles (i.e., a Halloween-themed Choco Taco). Boo Batter Ice Cream and its related desserts are available for a limited time now through October 31, 2025. Photo via Cold Stone Creamery. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Buffalo Ranch Chicken Strip Sandwich Returns to Whataburger
    Whataburger's Buffalo Ranch Chicken Strip Sandwich is back on the menu for a limited time this fall. Inspired by Buffalo chicken wings (and in time for football season), the sandwich features three crispy-fried Whatachick'n Strips, two slices of Monterey Jack cheese, Buffalo Sauce, and Creamy Buttermilk Ranch, served on a toasted five-inch bun. A Jr. version (on a four-inch bun with two chicken strips) is also available for smaller appetites. Prices vary, but a location in Dallas charges $7.59 for a Buffalo Ranch Chicken Strip Sandwich by itself and $11.29 for a Whatameal that includes the sandwich, medium fries, and a medium drink. Photo via Whataburger. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )
